description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a long, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears metallic, likely made of steel, and is uniformly dark gray in color. The handle is cylindrical and dark, capped with a rounded pommel and a simple crossguard, both of which are a muted gold or brass color. The crossguard is straight and unadorned, providing basic hand protection. There are no visible engravings or decorative elements on the blade, handle, or guard, giving the sword a utilitarian appearance. The proportions suggest it is a one-handed sword, suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A straight, narrow-bladed sword with a simple crossguard and rounded pommel, featuring a dark metallic blade and muted gold handle accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and the simple crossguard and pommel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the blade, the crossguard, and the rounded pommel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full length of the blade and handle details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the blade, handle, and the crossguard's width.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, dark material, rounded pommel, simple grip
